transcription.text: You're Drew Brees. I'm sorry to bother you, but my car broke down and I'd really appreciate a ride to the stadium. Yes, but no. I have to stay here and wait for a package. I thought anybody who rooted for me would have FedEx Delivery Manager. That way you can sign for your packages remotely and even customize your delivery time. Excuse me, sir. Could you take me to the stadium? Sure. I'll be there. Thank you. You're like jazz. Sorry. Sorry. Customize your deliveries with FedEx Delivery Manager.

metadata.title: 2017 FedEx Mobile App Broke Down featuring Drew Brees
